case_title: KFORCE GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. JASMINDER SINGH et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-26-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-07-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF PERMANENT INJUNCTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF AND ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGH, JASMINDER
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KFORCE GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-05-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KFORCE GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, JASMINDER DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-26-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-11-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-07-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2012 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE JUDGMENT FOLLOWING ORDER GRANTING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE DEC-18-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KFORCE GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC. SERVED APR-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, JASMINDER
FEE PAID ON STIP AND [PROPOSED] PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KFORCE GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC.
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF KFORCE GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC.
